response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented engineer with a current Staff title, strong TypeScript, and directly relevant AI-native exposure through MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. He has genuine high-throughput experience (micro-services handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic), but it dates to 2011-2013 and was in DLang, while Python — an explicit must-have — is absent from his resume entirely. Recent work skews toward full-stack product and open-source platform development rather than designing large-scale distributed systems or driving domain-level technical strategy across stakeholders, so fit for a distributed-systems-heavy Staff role is plausible but unproven.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic-workflow frameworks) matching the AI-native baseline
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth with polyglot breadth and a testing/quality-first engineering culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Proven high-throughput, low-latency systems work at Sociomantic plus long-running ownership of an open-source geo platform he founded
concerns: No Python listed anywhere despite 'strong Python' being a must-have
Distributed-systems-at-scale experience is over a decade old; recent roles are smaller-scale full-stack work
Limited evidence of Staff-scope technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, or formal on-call/incident-response ownership
